extName.description: Extension name shown in the Chrome Web Store and toolbar.

extDescription.message: Reads your TrainingPeaks body metrics through your own logged-in session — no password, no API key — and hands them to the Kaiord editor.
extDescription.description: Extension description shown in the Chrome Web Store.

checking.description: Status text while the popup probes the session.

checkingAria.description: Accessible label for the checking status pill.

connectedToTrainingPeaks.description: Status text when the TrainingPeaks session can mint a token.

connectedHint.message: Reading your body metrics through your session.
connectedHint.description: Hint shown below the status when connected.

noSession.description: Status text when the TrainingPeaks session cannot mint a token.

noSessionHint.message: Open TrainingPeaks and sign in, then reopen this popup.
noSessionHint.description: Hint telling the user how to establish a session.

openTrainingPeaks.description: Button that opens app.trainingpeaks.com in a new tab.

openTrainingPeaksAria.description: Accessible label for the Open TrainingPeaks button.
